title: Kineti-craft: high-tech
body:
The modpack for kineti-craft season 2. it is a tech modpack focused on mods like, create and ae2, there is space to! it is a higly optimized pack so even lower end pc's and laptops can enjoy


if ant problems occur or if you have any suggestions, joi nym discord via the second link!

minimum ram: 2gb
recommended ram: 4gb

want to join the server? [click here](https://discord.gg/qsCJtseHTJ)

like this modpack and want more of my packs? [click here](https://discord.gg/kx3dfkVhEg)
